# function: cidrcontains

Returns true if the containing CIDR prefix fully encompasses the contained CIDR prefix. Both arguments must be in CIDR notation. To check a single IP, use a `/32` (IPv4) or `/128` (IPv6) prefix. Supports both IPv4 and IPv6, but both arguments must be the same address family.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidrcontains(containing_prefix string, contained_prefix string) bool
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `containing_prefix` (String) CIDR prefix to check against (e.g. `10.0.0.0/8` or `fd00::/16`)
1. `contained_prefix` (String) CIDR prefix to check (e.g. `10.1.0.0/16` or `10.1.2.3/32`)
